cta.subline: Reserve a table and let us take care of the rest.
cta.headline: Experience Our Story Firsthand

hero.subline: A neighborhood restaurant with a global palate and a seasonal soul.
hero.headline: Our Story

story.body:
After a decade of cooking in Michelin-starred kitchens in New York and Lyon, Marcus wanted to build something different — a restaurant where the food was uncompromising but the atmosphere was warm, where every ingredient told a story of place and season.

We work directly with farms within 150 miles of Manhattan, changing our menu as the seasons change. Our sommelier David Chen has built a 350-label wine program with a focus on sustainable and biodynamic producers. Our bar director Sarah Kim creates cocktails that are as thoughtful and seasonal as the food.

The result is a restaurant that feels both special and familiar — a place where celebrations happen naturally and regulars become friends.
story.pullQuote: I cook with the seasons because nature is the best menu writer. My job is simply to listen.
story.leadParagraph: The Meridian was born from a simple belief: that a great meal can turn an ordinary evening into an occasion. Chef Marcus Bellamy opened our doors on the Upper West Side in 2019 with a mission to celebrate seasonal American cuisine through the lens of global technique.

items.title: Seasonal First
items.description: Our menu changes with the harvest. Every dish reflects what's freshest and most alive right now.

items.title: Global Technique
items.description: French foundations, Japanese precision, Latin warmth — our cooking draws from the world's great traditions.

items.title: Genuine Hospitality
items.description: Fine dining without pretension. We want every guest to feel welcomed, celebrated, and cared for.

teamPreview.subline: A passionate team of culinary professionals dedicated to your experience.
teamPreview.headline: The People Behind the Plates
